title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・緊急コード

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Brian... really is... as fast as a jet!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What the hell?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Why... can I still not...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmph. It's like I'm not even on her radar.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Just what the heck is she looking a—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What is Brian looking at?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer? Can I ask you for something?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Please let me race against Brian one more time.
As soon as possible.
choice_data_list: You still want to challenge her?
You still want to challenge her?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm not really sure why, but I know I have
to...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Not just that. This time, I feel like I should do it as
soon as possible...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Mayano... You felt that in today's race?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I see. Then I guess I've gotta tell ya.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is your last chance.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Brian's decided the Arima will be her last race
before she quits running.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Tch... It's still too early for her to quit!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hishiama?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But... why? That doesn't make any sense.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't have to be her last race... She was
incredible today.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Running against her got me so excited again.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I can't let it end like this... I won't accept it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I don't want it to end on a loss!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I do. More than anything else.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll make sure she's the one trembling
with excitement.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Some racers are so twinkly the audience can't
even see the other racers. They get everyone
excited.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna become a racer that can excite her like that!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama said that Brian's last race will be the
Arima Kinen, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That means you have until the Arima Kinen to
train me to perfection.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Ehehe, I can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets her sights on the Arima Kinen—a race
against the incredible opponent she so wishes to
excite. That means we need to get her on the G1
agenda.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a chance this summer and another one in
autumn. She either has to run in a G1
long-distance race similar to the Arima or a
medium-distance G1 race.
choice_data_list:
The Takarazuka Kinen and the autumn Tenno
Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll run in those. I'll run as fast as I can... and
get even better.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I feel like that's what I have to do.
